name: Mesquite Grilled Chicken with Pineapple Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Chicken Breast, skinless and boneless
1 can Pineapple, DOLE, crushed and drained
1 tablespoon Soy Sauce, Chun King Lite
1/4 teaspoon Hot Shot Black & Red Pepper blend (McCormick/Schilling), up to 1/2 teaspoon, as desired
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Chicken Mesquite Marinade according to package directions using 1 lb of chicken breast.
2. Grill the seasoned chicken until fully cooked.
3. Serve with Pineapple Salsa made by combining crushed pineapple, red bell pepper, green onion, lime juice, soy sauce, and black & red pepper blend.
Pineapple Salsa: Combine all ingredients in a bowl and serve alongside grilled chicken.
